title: Renewable Hydrogen Production: Air Liquide Strengthens its Partnership with TotalEnergies through a New Major Project in the South of France
content: Air Liquide announces a renewable hydrogen production project at La MÃ¨de (Provence-Alpes-CÃ´te d'Azur region in France). In the context of a long-term contract, Air Liquide will cover the hydrogen needs of TotalEnergie's biorefinery. In the framework of a long-term contract, Air Liquide will build, own and operate a new hydrogen production unit at TotalEnergies' La MÃ¨de site, with a capacity of 25,000 tonnes per year.
author: Analysts Account
